name: ExactSpend

pricing_tiers.notes: Adds multi-entity, advanced approval workflows, dedicated CSM

compliance.ifrs15_roadmap: Q3 2025 (confirmed by vendor roadmap, not yet GA)

features: multi-currency invoicing (35+ currencies including EUR, USD, CHF native)
real-time bank feeds (Barclays, HSBC, Lloyds, NatWest, Monzo, Starling)
fast reconciliation engine (200k rows in under 90 seconds)
audit trail export: PDF with digital signature
project billing and profitability by engagement
known_limitations: IFRS 15 revenue recognition module planned Q3 2025 — not yet GA; workaround required until then
EUR invoice template customisation limited compared to dedicated invoicing tools
notes: At Business tier: £365/mo vs VaultLedger £420/mo = £55/mo saving (£660/yr). Migration at 15hrs × £48 = £720, amortised £240/yr. Net = £420/yr — below £1,200 threshold on direct saving. Resolves: multi-currency (EUR), real-time Barclays feed, audit trail PDF, PayAxis native sync. Does NOT resolve IFRS 15 — roadmap Q3 2025, not GA. If IFRS 15 is the blocking issue, this is a HOLD until Q3 2025 confirmation. Strong candidate once IFRS 15 ships.
